summary: Static code analysis completed for expo-print native module error fix. All requirements verified through code inspection. The fix correctly implements a try/catch fallback pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: TypeScript compilation shows module resolution errors (expected in RN environment without node_modules) - not actual code logic errors

success_rate.backend: N/A - React Native app, no backend to test

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native/Expo app. No web server runs. Testing was static code analysis only. The expo-print fallback fix has been verified.
